messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.
Criar Object Storage bucket com Terraform?

## Object Storage Bucket

### Basic Bucket

```hcl
resource "oci_object_storage_bucket" "bucket" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  namespace     = var.namespace
  name         = "my-unique-bucket-name"
  storage_tier  = "Standard"

  versioning = "Enabled"
  encryption = "OracleManaged"
}
```

### With Lifecycle Policy

```hcl
resource "oci_object_storage_bucket" "tiered_bucket" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  namespace     = var.namespace
  name         = "my-tiered-bucket"

  lifecycle_policy {
    rules {
      name      = "archive-after-90-days"
      action    = "ARCHIVE"
      days      = 90
      is_enabled = true
    }
  }
}
```

### Pre-authenticated Request

```hcl
resource "oci_object_storage_preauthrequest" "par" {
  namespace     = oci_object_storage_bucket.bucket.namespace
  bucket_name  = oci_object_storage_bucket.bucket.name
  name         = "my-par"
  object_name  = "myfile.txt"
  access_type  = "ObjectRead"
  time_expires = "2025-12-31T00:00:00Z"
}
```
